meaning: to be at home; (at a workplace) to be in (as opposed to being away on
pinyin: Zhōu mò wǒ xǐ huān zài jiā xiū xi.
english: On weekends I like to rest at home.

sentence: 局长今天主持了年度工作会议。
pinyin: Júzhǎng jīntiān zhǔchí le niándù gōngzuò huìyì.
english: The bureau chief presided over the annual work meeting today.

meaning: 1. to call into question; 2. to question (truth or validity)
sentence: 有人对这项研究的结果提出了质疑。
pinyin: Yǒu rén duì zhè xiàng yánjiū de jiéguǒ tíchū le zhì yí.
english: Someone called into question the results of this study.

sentence: 违规停车将依法受到处罚。
pinyin: Wéiguī tíngchē jiāng yī fǎ shòudào chǔfá.
english: Illegal parking will be penalized according to the law.

sentence: 这项政策产生了明显的蝴蝶效应。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng zhèngcè chǎnshēng le míngxiǎn de húdié xiàoyìng.
english: This policy produced an obvious butterfly effect.
